use_cases: Displaying analytics metrics with animated chart visualizations in dashboards
Showcasing data insights with interactive hover-reveal tooltips
Presenting KPIs and metrics cards in SaaS applications
Building data-rich card layouts with smooth slide transitions
Creating interactive visualization components for analytics platforms
ai_summary: AnimatedCard is a composite data visualization card component featuring layered chart visuals, hover-reveal tooltip panels, and smooth horizontal slide transitions. Built with minimalist flat styling and dark mode support, it integrates sub-components for body content, titles, descriptions, and custom chart visuals. Ideal for SaaS dashboards and analytics platforms requiring interactive data presentation.
